ddls:
CREATE TABLE "lease_properties" (
  "lease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lease property */,
  "lease_name" TEXT /* Name of the lease property */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the lease property is located */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the lease property is situated */,
  "cumulative_boe" TEXT /* Cumulative barrels of oil equivalent produced from the lease property */,
  "producers" TEXT /* Names of producers associated with the lease property */,
  "lease_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the lease was signed */,
  "lease_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the lease expires */,
  "lease_status" TEXT /* Current status of the lease */,
  "lease_type" TEXT /* Type of lease */,
  "lease_area" REAL /* Area of the lease property in square miles */,
  "lease_depth" REAL /* Depth of the lease property in feet */,
  "lease_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the lease property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lease_properties_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("state_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lease_properties_county FOREIGN KEY ("county") REFERENCES counties ("county_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "producers" (
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each producer */,
  "producer_name" TEXT /* Name of the producer company */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the producer */,
  "producer_type" TEXT /* Type of producer */,
  "producer_status" TEXT /* Current status of the producer */,
  "producer_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the producer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_data" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production record */,
  "lease_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lease property */,
  "production_volume" REAL /* Volume of oil produced during the reporting period (in barrels) */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date of the production record */,
  "production_type" TEXT /* Type of production */,
  "production_method" TEXT /* Method of production */,
  "production_well_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the production well */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_data_lease_id FOREIGN KEY ("lease_id") REFERENCES lease_properties ("lease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "county_population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "county_area" REAL /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "state_area" REAL /* Area of the state in square miles */,
  "state_regulations" TEXT /* Summary of state-specific regulations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lease_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "lease_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lease property */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date of the action (e.g., lease signed, renewed) */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action taken */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "action_by" TEXT /* Name of the person or entity that performed the action */,
  "action_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lease_history_lease_id FOREIGN KEY ("lease_id") REFERENCES lease_properties ("lease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "lease_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lease property */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated from the lease property */,
  "cost" REAL /* Total costs associated with the lease property */,
  "profit" REAL /* Calculated profit from the lease property */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date the financial data was reported */,
  "capital_expenditure" REAL /* Capital expenditure for the lease property */,
  "operating_cost" REAL /* Operating cost for the lease property */,
  "net_profit" REAL /* Net profit after taxes */,
  "return_on_investment" REAL /* Return on investment for the lease property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financials_lease_id FOREIGN KEY ("lease_id") REFERENCES lease_properties ("lease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "lease_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lease property */,
  "compliance_type" TEXT /* Type of environmental compliance action (e.g., inspection, report) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the compliance action (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date the compliance action was reported */,
  "compliance_officer" TEXT /* Name of the compliance officer */,
  "compliance_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the compliance action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_compliance_lease_id FOREIGN KEY ("lease_id") REFERENCES lease_properties ("lease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lease_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact record */,
  "lease_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lease property */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "contact_position" TEXT /* Position of the contact person */,
  "contact_department" TEXT /* Department of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lease_contacts_lease_id FOREIGN KEY ("lease_id") REFERENCES lease_properties ("lease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lease_audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "lease_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lease property */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the audit */,
  "auditor_name" TEXT /* Name of the auditor */,
  "findings" TEXT /* Findings from the audit */,
  "audit_type" TEXT /* Type of audit */,
  "audit_findings_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the audit findings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lease_audits_lease_id FOREIGN KEY ("lease_id") REFERENCES lease_properties ("lease_id")
)
